title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 16–17, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's enough food here for a hundred people.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So hurry up and bring it to your men.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sir! How could you give them the food!? Just what's the meaning of this!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Once those pirates on that ship recover,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They still have any fighting spirit left at all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The strongest man of East Blue...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The pirate Fleet Admiral of 50 ships...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even he was utterly defeated by Grand Line!?

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
